meaning: 別緻、時尚、時尚；以通心粉的方式。
sentences: Something described as macaroni is chic, fashionable, stylish; in the manner of a macaroni. 被描述為通心粉的東西是別緻的、時尚的、時尚的；以通心粉的方式。
The word macaroni is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 通心粉這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
The term mace refers to a ceremonial form of this weapon. 術語“狼牙棒”指的是這種武器的儀式形式。
The lesson introduced mace as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「狼牙棒」這個易於理解的有用術語。
After some hours of intense work, we had macheted a path through the jungle to the bank of the river. 經過幾個小時的緊張工作，我們開闢了一條穿過叢林到達河岸的小路。
To machete means to cut or chop with a machete. 砍刀意味著用砍刀切割或砍伐。
The washing machine is making a strange noise. 洗衣機正發出奇怪的噪音。
Modern factories use advanced machines to increase production. 現代工廠使用先進機器來增加產量。
Modern factories use advanced and efficient machinery to produce goods. 現代工廠使用先進高效的機械來生產商品。
The researchers are studying the internal machinery of human cells. 研究人員正研究人體細胞的內部機制（機械）。

meaning: 機器和引擎的建造者；對機器有了解的人。
sentences: The term machinist refers to A constructor of machines and engines; someone knowledgeable about machines. 機械師一詞是指機器和發動機的建造者；對機器有了解的人。
We learned the meaning of machinist during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了機械師的意義。

meaning: 擅長運用語言技巧進行誘惑的個人；一個誘惑者。
sentences: She left with him; he must be a true mack. 她和他一起離開了；他一定是個真正的麥克。
The term mack refers to an individual skilled in the art of seduction using verbal skills; a seducer. 術語「麥克」是指使用語言技巧進行誘惑的技術人員；一個誘惑者。

meaning: 類似魚鱗的規則圖案，由起伏的小雲組成，雲之間可見天空。
sentences: a mackerel sky 鯖魚的天空
The term mackerel refers to a regular pattern, similar to fish scales, of undulating small clouds with sky visible between them. 鯖魚一詞指的是一種類似魚鱗的規則圖案，由起伏的小雲組成，雲朵之間可見天空。
Don't forget to wear your mackintosh; it's raining outside. 別忘了穿雨衣；外面正在下雨。
He hung his wet mackintosh near the door. 他將濕淋淋的雨衣掛在門邊。
Something described as macro is very large in scope or scale. 被描述為宏觀的事物的範圍或規模非常大。
The word macro is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 宏觀這個詞常用來描述一個人、一個事物或一個情況。
He was absolutely mad with me for being late again. 他因為我再次遲到而對我大發雷霆。
Are you mad? You can't go out in this terrible storm! 你瘋了嗎？你不能在這麼恐怖的暴風雨中出門！
'How can I help you, madam?' the polite waiter asked the elderly guest. 「夫人，有什麼我可以幫您的嗎？」禮貌的服務生問道。
She is a respected ma'am who has dedicated her life to helping the community. 她是一位受人尊敬的女士，致力於幫助社區。
To madden means to make insane; to inflame with passion. To madden 的意思是使人發瘋；點燃激情。
People may madden in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下發瘋。

meaning: 以一種沒有理由或理解的瘋狂方式；瘋狂地。
sentences: I'm madly in love with you. 我瘋狂地愛著你。
Diane screamed madly down the phone to the prank caller. 黛安在電話裡對惡作劇的來電者瘋狂尖叫。

meaning: 精神錯亂或精神錯亂的人。
sentences: The term madman refers to a man who is insane or mentally disturbed. 瘋子一詞指的是精神錯亂或精神錯亂的人。
The lesson introduced madman as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「瘋子」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 瘋狂的狀態；瘋狂;精神疾病。
sentences: The term madness refers to The state of being mad; insanity; mental disease. 瘋狂一詞指的是瘋狂的狀態；瘋狂;精神疾病。
We learned the meaning of madness during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們了解了瘋狂的含義。

meaning: 某種藝術的大師，尤其是作曲家或指揮家。
sentences: The term maestro refers to a master in some art, especially a composer or conductor. 大師一詞指的是某些藝術領域的大師，尤其是作曲家或指揮家。
The lesson introduced maestro as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了大師作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
I usually read a fashion magazine while waiting at the dentist. 我在看牙醫等候時通常會讀時尚雜誌。
The magazine published an interesting article on space travel. 該雜誌發表了一篇關於太空旅行的有趣文章。

meaning: 魔術師、巫師、術士、女巫、術士或神秘主義者。
sentences: The term mage refers to a magician, wizard, sorcerer, witch, warlock or mystic. 法師一詞指魔術師、巫師、術士、女巫、術士或神秘主義者。
The lesson introduced mage as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了法師作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 接近紅色和藍色等量混合的顏色，是加法二次色，但由紅色和淺藍色組合產生的減法原色。
sentences: web magenta (additive magenta): 捲筒洋紅色（添加劑洋紅色）：
printer's magenta (subtractive magenta): 印表機洋紅色（減色洋紅色）：
Drop and give me fifty, maggot. 放下來給我五十，蛆。
The term maggot refers to A worthless person. 蛆一詞指的是無價值的人。
The children were amazed by the magician's clever magic tricks. 孩子們被魔術師聰明的魔術表演驚呆了。
There is something magic about the forest in the morning mist. 早晨霧氣中的森林有一種奇幻的感覺。
The sunset over the ocean was a truly magical sight to behold. 海上的日落簡直是一幕真正奇幻、值得觀賞的景象。
The children had a magical experience at the Disneyland park. 孩子們在迪士尼樂園度過了一段奇妙的經歷。

meaning: 以一種神奇的方式；透過魔法，或好像透過魔法。
sentences: If someone acts magically, they do so in a way that is in a magical manner; by magic, or as if by magic. 如果有人施展魔法，他們會以一種魔法的方式這樣做；透過魔法，或好像透過魔法。
The speaker responded magically during the discussion. 演講者在討論過程中做出了神奇的回應。
The magician amazed the children with his clever magic tricks. 魔術師用他聰明的魔術表演讓孩子們驚嘆不已。
He decided to become a professional magician after years of study. 經過多年的學習，他決定成為一名專業魔術師。

meaning: 中世紀或現代機構中的類似官員。
sentences: Like other civil servants, Ashok Kumar started his career as an Assistant Collector cum Sub-divisional Magistrate. 與其他公務員一樣，阿肖克·庫馬爾 (Ashok Kumar) 的職業生涯始於助理稅收官兼分區治安法官。
The term magistrate refers to a comparable official in medieval or modern institutions. 治安法官一詞指的是中世紀或現代機構中的類似官員。

meaning: 由配備單一二元運算的集合組成的基本代數結構。
sentences: The term magma refers to a basic algebraic structure consisting of a set equipped with a single binary operation. 岩漿一詞是指由配備單一二元運算的集合組成的基本代數結構。
The lesson introduced magma as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了岩漿作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

I have decided to become an oil magnate, after spending quite some time reading the dictionary definition of the word magnate. 在花了相當長的時間閱讀字典中“大亨”一詞的定義後，我決定成為一名石油大亨。 在花了相當長的時間閱讀字典中“巨頭”一詞的定義後，我決定成為石油巨頭。 在花了相當長的時間閱讀字典中“大亨”的定義後，我決定成為一名石油大亨。
The term magnate refers to Powerful industrialist; captain of industry. 巨頭這個字指的是 強大 實業家; 。 巨頭一詞指的是有實力的實業家；工業隊長。 黨這個字是指建立實業家； 。

meaning: 原子序數為12的化學元素。它是一種輕、易燃、銀白色的鹼土金屬。
sentences: The term magnesium refers to the chemical element with an atomic number of 12. It is a light, easily flammable, silvery-white alkaline earth metal. 鎂一詞是指原子序為12的化學元素。它是一種輕質、易燃的銀白色鹼土金屬。
The lesson introduced magnesium as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了鎂這個易於理解的有用術語。
The little boy was playing with small magnets on the fridge. 小男孩正在用小磁鐵在冰箱上玩耍。
The city center acts as a magnet for tourists and businesses. 市中心就像一塊磁石，吸引著遊客與企業。
The Earth has a strong magnetic field that protects it from radiation. 地球有一個強大的磁（磁的）場，保護它免受輻射。
She has a very magnetic personality and everyone likes her tonight. 她今晚展現了非常吸引人的（磁性的）個性，每個人都喜歡她。

meaning: 吸引力；激發感情並贏得感情的力量。
sentences: The term magnetism refers to power of attraction; power to excite the feelings and to gain the affections. 術語「磁性」是指吸引力；激發感情並贏得感情的力量。
The lesson introduced magnetism as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了磁力作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
His story included a magnification of the events. 他的故事包括對事件的放大。
The term magnification refers to The act of magnifying; enlargement; exaggeration. 放大一詞是指放大的行為；放大;誇張。
The sunset over the ocean was a truly magnificent sight to behold. 海上的日落簡直是一幕真正壯麗（壯麗）且值得觀賞的景象。
The ancient palace is a magnificent structure made of solid marble. 那座古代宮殿是一座由實心大理石建成的宏偉（壯麗）建築。
The scientist used a powerful microscope to magnify the tiny organism. 科學家利用強大的顯微鏡來放大那個微小的生物。
Please don't magnify the problem; it's relatively small and easily solved. 請不要誇大問題；它相對較小，很容易解決。

meaning: 恆星的表觀亮度，星等越低越亮；視星等。
sentences: The term magnitude refers to the apparent brightness of a star, with lower magnitudes being brighter; apparent magnitude. 術語星等是指恆星的視亮度，星等越低，星等越亮。表觀震級。
The lesson introduced magnitude as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了震級作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The garden is filled with the sweet scent of blooming magnolias. 花園裡瀰漫著盛開木蘭花的甜美香氣。
She wore a white magnolia flower in her hair. 她在頭髮上戴了一朵白木蘭。

meaning: 發射這種口徑子彈的手槍；主要是左輪手槍，但很少有自動裝彈機發射異常強大的口徑。
sentences: The term magnum refers to a handgun that fires a cartridge of this calibre; chiefly a revolver, but rarely an autoloader firing an unusually powerful calibre. 術語“Magnum”指的是發射這種口徑子彈的手槍。主要是左輪手槍，但很少有自動裝彈機發射異常強大的口徑。
The lesson introduced magnum as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 magnum 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The magpie is known for its black and white feathers and loud call. 喜鵲以其黑白羽毛和響亮的叫聲聞名。
He is a real magpie and collects all sorts of interesting items. 他是個真正的收集狂（喜鵲），收集各種有趣的東西。

meaning: 在印度或西藏，一個被認為具有豐富的知識和對人類的熱愛的人。
sentences: The term mahatma refers to in India or Tibet, a person thought to have great knowledge and love of humanity. 聖雄一詞在印度或西藏指的是被認為具有豐富的知識和對人類的熱愛的人。
The lesson introduced mahatma as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了聖雄這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一張由紅木製成的桌子；一張餐桌。
sentences: The term mahogany refers to a table made from mahogany wood; a dining table. 紅木一詞是指由紅木製成的桌子；一張餐桌。
The lesson introduced mahogany as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了桃花心木這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The hotel employs several full-time maids to clean the rooms. 飯店雇用了幾名全職女傭來清理房間。
The maid ensured that all the laundry was washed and folded. 女傭確保所有的衣物都已洗好並摺疊好。
The story follows a brave young maiden who travels through a dark forest. 故事講述了一位穿過漆黑森林的勇敢少女。
The new ocean liner set out on its maiden voyage across the Atlantic. 這艘新郵輪開始了它橫渡大西洋的處女航（首次航行）。
I received an important mail from the university this morning. 我今天早上收到一封來自大學的重要郵件。
Please don't forget to check the mailbox for letters. 請別忘了檢查信箱有沒有信。

meaning: 用於儲存電子郵件的資料夾或帳戶；電子收件匣或郵件存儲。
sentences: The term mailbox refers to a folder or account for the storage of email; an electronic inbox or mailstore. 術語「郵箱」是指用於儲存電子郵件的資料夾或帳戶；電子收件匣或郵件儲存。
The lesson introduced mailbox as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了郵箱這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 專為郵政使用而設計的包裹或容器。
sentences: The cassette came in a brown paper mailer. 盒式磁帶裝在牛皮紙郵寄袋中。
The term mailer refers to A packet or container designed for postal use. 術語「郵寄」是指設計用於郵寄的包裹或容器。
The accident maimed him for life. 那次事故使他終身殘廢。
Many soldiers were maimed during the war. 許多士兵在戰爭中致殘。

meaning: 通常因受傷或受傷而部分或完全喪失身體某些部位的使用能力。
sentences: The report describes the result as maimed. 報告將結果描述為致殘。
Everyone noticed the maimed tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的傷感語氣。
The main reason for his success is his hard work and dedication. 他成功的主要原因是他的努力工作和奉獻精神。
The hotel is located on the main street of the city. 飯店位於城市的繁忙主街上。
The island is connected to the mainland by a long bridge and a regular ferry. 該島透過一座長橋和定期渡輪與本土（大陸）相連。
They decided to travel to the mainland for a weekend of shopping and culture. 他們決定去本土過一個充滿購物與文化氣息的週末。
If someone acts mainly, they do so in a way that is to a great degree; very much. 如果某人主要行事，那麼他的行事方式就在很大程度上；非常。
The speaker responded mainly during the discussion. 發言者主要在討論過程中回應。

meaning: 家用電源，尤其是連接到網路或電網的電源。
sentences: I plugged it into the mains and it blew up! 我把它插到電源上，它就爆炸了！
We don't have mains power out here, only a generator. 我們這裡沒有主電源，只有發電機。
Her ideas were once considered radical, but they are now part of the mainstream. 她的想法曾被認為是激進的，但現在已成為主流的一部分。
The new project aims to move renewable energy into the mainstream market. 這個新專案旨在將可再生能源推向主流市場。
It's important to maintain a positive attitude in difficult times. 在困難時期保持積極的態度是很重要的。
The mechanic recommended regular service to maintain the car. 技師建議定期保養以維護車子。
Regular maintenance of your car is essential for safety and performance. 定期保養（維修）汽車對於安全和性能至關重要。
The maintenance of international peace and security is a major global goal. 維持國際和平與安全是一個重大的全球目標。
Maize is a major crop grown in many parts of the world. 玉米是世界許多地區種植的主要作物。
In some cultures, maize is a staple food. 在某些文化中，玉米是主食。
The view of the majestic mountains from the hotel was truly breathtaking. 從飯店看到的雄偉山景真是驚人。
The eagle is a majestic bird that can soar high above the countryside. 老鷹是一種能在鄉間上空高高翱翔的壯麗鳥類。
The historic cathedral has a sense of majesty and beauty that is unique. 這座歷史悠久的大教堂有一種獨特的莊嚴（威嚴）與美感。
The people gathered to welcome Her Majesty the Queen during her official visit. 人民聚集在一起，歡迎女王陛下進行正式訪問。
Hard work is a major factor in achieving success in your career. 努力工作是事業取得成功的一個主要因素。
The city is a major center for international trade and finance. 這座城市是國際貿易與金融的主要中心。
The majority of students in the class passed the final exam. 班上的大多數學生都通過了期末考試。
The new policy is supported by a large majority of the population. 這項新政策得到了大部分民眾的支持。
My mother is learning how to make delicious traditional cakes. 我媽媽正在學習如何做美味的傳統蛋糕。
It's important to make a good first impression at a job interview. 在求職面試中留下良好的第一印象很重要。
She applied some make-up before going to the party. 她在去派對前化了一點妝。
The genetic make-up of individuals varies significantly. 個體的遺傳組成有很大差異。

meaning: 製造的人；製造或生產某物的人或物。
sentences: The term maker refers to someone who makes; a person or thing that makes or produces something. 製造者一詞指的是製造的人；製造或生產某物的人或物。
The lesson introduced maker as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了創客這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 專為工作或滿足需求而設計；即興創作；取代的。
sentences: They used the ledge and a few branches for a makeshift shelter. 他們用壁架和幾根樹枝搭建了臨時住所。
Something described as makeshift is made to work or suffice; improvised; substituted. 被描述為臨時湊合的東西是為了工作或足夠而設計的；即興創作；取代。
She applied some light natural makeup to her face before the party. 她在派對前在臉上化了一些淡雅的自然妝（化妝品）。
The genetic makeup of the individual manages to determine health. 個體的基因組成（化妝品，指構成）竟然（能）決定健康。
As a child, he didn’t seem like a genius in the making. 小時候，他看起來不像天才。
The term making refers to Process of growth or development. 術語“製作”是指成長或發展的過程。

meaning: 一種野兔袋鼠，Lagorchestes hirsutus，產於乾旱的澳洲。
sentences: The term mala refers to A species of hare-wallaby, Lagorchestes hirsutus, of arid Australia. 「馬拉」一詞指的是一種生活在乾旱澳洲的野兔袋鼠 Lagorchestes hirsutus。
We learned the meaning of mala during today's lesson. 我們在今天的課程中學習了「mala」的意思。

meaning: 模棱兩可 心理 或 或 "&Fm&adm&m> 道德道德/Linkm="wikis/x. href="/wiki/depression" title="憂鬱症">憂鬱症 。
sentences: The term malaise refers to An ambiguous feeling of mental or moral depression. 不適一詞是指 模棱兩可 精神 或 憂鬱症 。 不適一詞是指精神或道德憂鬱的模糊感覺。 並非指模組兩可精神或憂鬱症。
The lesson introduced malaise as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「不適」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了「不適」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了「不一致」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Malaria is a serious disease transmitted by mosquitoes. 瘧疾是由蚊子傳播的一種嚴重疾病。
Make sure you take anti-malaria medicine before traveling to certain regions. 前往某些地區前，請確保服用抗瘧疾藥物。
The company is committed to achieving a better gender balance. 公司致力於實現更好的性別平衡。
The male lion has a magnificent mane that covers its neck. 雄獅擁有覆蓋其頸部的雄偉鬃毛。

I hope you realize that I said it without any malice. 我希望你明白，我說那話沒有任何惡意。

He was maligned by the media after the scandal. 醜聞發生後，他遭到了媒體的誹謗。

She is undergoing treatment for a malignant condition. 她正接受惡性病症的治療。

meaning: 阿富汗和巴基斯坦某些地區的部落酋長，特別是普什圖人的部落酋長。

The report describes the result as malleable. 報告稱該結果具有可塑性。
He used a rubber mallet to fix the loose tiles. 他用橡膠槌固定鬆動的磁磚。

meaning: 醫生對患者進行不當治療，導致患者受傷或損失。
sentences: The term malpractice refers to the improper treatment of a patient by a physician that results in injury or loss. 醫療事故一詞是指醫生對患者進行不當治療，導致患者受傷或損失。

Malt is a key ingredient in the production of beer and whiskey. 麥芽是生產啤酒和威士忌的關鍵原料。
I love the taste of a chocolate malt shake. 我喜歡麥芽巧克力奶昔的味道。

meaning: 女性和其他哺乳動物的泌乳器官，包括乳腺和乳頭或乳頭；乳房；乳房。
sentences: The term mamma refers to the milk-secreting organ of female humans and other mammals which includes the mammary gland and the nipple or teat; a breast; an udder. 術語「媽媽」是指女性人類和其他哺乳動物的乳汁分泌器官，包括乳腺和乳頭或乳頭；乳房；乳房。

Whales and dolphins are mammals that live in the ocean and breathe air. 鯨魚和海豚是生活在海洋中並呼吸空氣的哺乳動物。

meaning: 屬於或關於哺乳動物的。
sentences: Something described as mammalian is of, or pertaining to, mammals. 被描述為哺乳動物的東西屬於或屬於哺乳動物。

meaning: 體型與猛獁象相當；非常大，巨大，巨大，巨大。
sentences: Something described as mammoth is comparable to a mammoth in its size; very large, huge, gigantic. 被描述為猛獁象的東西的大小與猛獁象相當。非常大，巨大，巨大。

meaning: 有能力完成或實現；可實現的。
sentences: Something described as manageable is capable of being done or fulfilled; achievable. 被描述為可管理的事情是能夠完成或實現的；可以實現的。
The word manageable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「可管理」一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。

The manager is responsible for making the final decisions. 經理負責做出最終決定。

meaning: 屬於或與經理或管理層有關的；涉及類似管理的職責。
sentences: Something described as managerial is of or relating to a manager or management; involving management-like duties. 被描述為管理的事物屬於或與經理或管理層有關；涉及類似管理的職責。

meaning: 與柑橘有關或讓人想起柑橘的；故意優越或複雜；深奧的, 曲高和寡的, 蒙昧主義者。
sentences: Something described as mandarin is pertaining to or reminiscent of mandarins; deliberately superior or complex; esoteric, highbrow, obscurantist. 被描述為普通話的東西與普通話有關或讓人想起普通話；故意優越或複雜；深奧的、曲高和寡的、蒙昧主義者。

meaning: 強制性的；當局要求或命令。

The male lion has a magnificent golden mane. 公獅有著瑰麗的金色鬃毛。
The horse's mane was neatly braided for the show. 這匹馬的鬃毛為了比賽被整齊地編成辮子。

meaning: 一種特定的醫療或外科手術，通常是同名的，由醫生的手或手術器械完成。
sentences: The otorhinolaryngologist performed an Epley maneuver and the patient was relieved of his vertigo. 耳鼻喉科醫生進行了艾普利手術，患者的眩暈症狀緩解了。

meaning: 任何這種風格的漫畫，無論原產國。
sentences: Lately I've been reading a Brazilian manga. 最近我在看一本巴西漫畫。

The stray dog was suffering from a severe case of mange. 這隻流浪狗患有嚴重的疥癬。

He achieved manhood after a traditional ceremony. 他在傳統儀式後步入成年。

meaning: 精神嚴重錯亂；瘋狂;瘋狂。

meaning: 原則、政策或意圖的公開聲明，特別是政黨的原則、政策或意圖。
sentences: the Communist Manifesto 共產黨宣言
A creed is a manifesto of religious or spiritual beliefs. 信條是宗教或精神信仰的宣言。

meaning: 種類、品質或表現形式不同；多樣化。

meaning: 代表權威或地位、能提供保護的象徵性服裝。
sentences: At the meeting, she finally assumed the mantle of leadership of the party. 會上，她終於擔負起了黨的領導職務。

meaning: 任何施肥物質，無論是否源自動物；肥料。

livestock manures 牲畜糞便

The market was filled with merchants selling a variety of goods now. 市場現在擠滿了銷售各式各樣商品的商人。
The judge was merciful and gave him a light sentence. 法官很仁慈，給了他輕判。
We should show a merciful attitude towards those who have made mistakes. 我們應該對那些犯錯的人表現出仁慈的態度。
Mercifully, the rain stopped just before the concert started. 幸好，音樂會開始前雨停了。
The soldiers treated the prisoners mercifully. 士兵們仁慈地對待俘虜。
The sun was merciless, and there was no shade in the desert. 烈日無情，沙漠裡沒有遮蔭處。
He was known for his merciless treatment of his enemies. 他以對敵人殘酷無情著稱。
The wind blew mercilessly across the cold landscape. 寒風無情地吹過冰冷的大地。
The teacher criticized the student's work mercilessly. 老師毫不留情地批評了這位學生的作品。
The prisoners managing to beg for mercy during the military trial. 囚犯在軍事審判期間竟然（設法）請求寬恕（憐憫）。
Everyone expressed their deep gratitude for his mercy and kindness. 每個人都對他的仁慈（憐憫）與善良表達了深深的感激。
It was a mere accident that I managed to encounter my old friend. 我竟然偶然遇見了老朋友，這純粹是個（僅僅）意外。
The project was a failure due to a mere lack of proper planning today. 該專案今天的失敗純粹是（僅僅）因為缺乏適當的規劃。
I'm merely suggesting that we reconsider our plans. 我只是建議我們重新考慮我們的計畫。
He was merely a witness to the accident. 他只不過是這次事故的目擊者。
The two small companies decided to merge to form a larger business entity. 兩家小公司決定合併形成一個更大的業務實體。
The small mountain stream eventually merges with the river in the valley. 山間的小溪最終匯入（合併進）谷中的河流。

meaning: 將兩個或多個部分合併為一個單元的行為或過程。
sentences: Club mergers reduced the number of teams by half 俱樂部合併使球隊數減少一半
The term merger refers to the act or process of merging two or more parts into a single unit. 合併一詞是指將兩個或多個部分合併為一個單元的行為或過程。

meaning: 某事物的最高點或最發達的點，或最輝煌的階段；頂峰, 頂峰, 頂峰。
sentences: The term meridian refers to the highest or most developed point, or most splendid stage, of something; culmination, peak, zenith. 經絡一詞是指某事物的最高點或最發達的點，或最輝煌的階段。頂峰，頂峰，頂峰。
The lesson introduced meridian as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了經絡作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She made a delicious lemon meringue pie for dessert. 她做了一道美味的檸檬蛋白霜派作為甜點。
Meringue is made from whipped egg whites and sugar. 蛋白霜是用打發的蛋白和糖製成的。
She was awarded a full scholarship based on her academic merits now. 她現在因其學術優點（優點）而獲頒全額獎學金。
The manager decided to evaluate each proposal on its own merit today. 經理今天決定根據每項提案本身的價值（優點）進行評估。

meaning: 值得嘉獎或嘉獎；應得的獎勵。
sentences: The policeman received the Award of Meritorious Service from his grateful department. 這位警察從他感激的部門那裡獲得了功績獎。
The report describes the result as meritorious. 報告稱這一結果是值得的。
The term merle refers to the Eurasian blackbird, Turdus merula. 術語“隕石色”指的是歐亞黑鳥 Turdus merula。
The lesson introduced merle as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了隕石色這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一種小型獵鷹，Falco columbarius，在北美北部、歐洲和亞洲繁殖。
sentences: The term merlin refers to a small falcon, Falco columbarius, that breeds in northern North America, Europe, and Asia. 梅林一詞指的是一種小型獵鷹，Falco columbarius，在北美北部、歐洲和亞洲繁殖。
The lesson introduced merlin as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 merlin 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The little girl enjoyed reading fairy tales about mermaids and hidden treasure. 小女孩喜歡讀關於美人魚和隱藏寶藏的童話故事。
The movie features a beautiful mermaid who falls in love with a human. 這部電影的主角是一位愛上人類的美麗美人魚。

meaning: 以 愉快 或 快樂 的方式。
sentences: The children sang merrily as they walked home. 孩子 快樂地唱著歌 走回家。 孩子們快樂地唱著歌走回家。 孩子們快樂地唱著歌回家。
She chatted merrily despite the rain. 儘管下著雨，她仍然 愉快地 聊天。 儘管下著雨，她還是愉快地聊天。 儘管下著雨，她仍然愉快地聊天。
I wish you a very Merry Christmas and a happy New Year! 我祝妳聖誕快樂，新年快樂！
The kids were having a merry time playing games in the park. 孩子們正在公園裡開心地玩遊戲度過愉快時光。
The children enjoyed riding the merry-go-round at the fair. 孩子們喜歡在集市上坐旋轉木馬。
The music of the merry-go-round could be heard throughout the park. 旋轉木馬的音樂在整個公園都能聽到。

meaning: 高於其他土地的平坦區域或高原，具有一個或多個懸崖狀邊緣。
sentences: A few more miles of hot sand and gravel and red stone brought us around a low mesa to the Little Colorado River. 又走了幾英里的熱沙、礫石和紅石，我們繞過了一座低矮的台地，來到了小科羅拉多河。
The term mesa refers to a flat area of land or plateau higher than other land, with one or more clifflike edges. 台地一詞是指高於其他土地的平坦區域或高原，具有一個或多個懸崖狀邊緣。
The music meshed well with the visuals in that film. 音樂與電影中的視覺效果非常吻合。
To mesh means to fit in; to come together harmoniously. 嚙合意味著適應；和諧地走到一起。
Please clean up the mess in your bedroom before the guests arrive. 請在客人到達前清理妳臥室裡的混亂（髒亂）。
The project was a complete mess due to the lack of planning. 由於缺乏規劃，這個專案簡直是一團糟。
Please leave a message if I don't answer the phone. 如果我沒接電話，請留言。
I received an important text message from the manager. 我收到一封來自經理的重要簡訊。
I received an important text message from the office messenger today. 我今天收到一封來自辦公室信差（信差）的重要簡訊。
The organization aims to act as a messenger of peace and security. 該組織旨在擔任和平與安全的使者（信差）。
Please clean up the messy room before the important guests arrive. 請在重要客人抵達前清理那間凌亂的（凌亂的）房間。
Her desk manages to be always messy, with papers and books everywhere. 她的書桌竟然（能）總是亂七八糟（凌亂的），到處都是文件和書。

meaning: 見面 (Meet 之過去式/過去分詞)
sentences: I met my old friend by accident in the shopping mall. 我在購物中心意外碰見了我的老朋友。
We have met several times before to discuss the project. 我們之前已經見面討論過幾次這個專案了。

meaning: 特定領域中非正式但廣泛採用的做法；事實上的標準。
sentences: Each video sharing platform's community has a meta on how long videos should be. 每個影片分享平台的社群都有關於影片長度的元資料。
The term meta refers to an informal but widely adopted practice in a given field; a de facto standard. 術語「元」是指在給定領域中非正式但廣泛採用的實踐；事實上的標準。

meaning: 屬於或關於新陳代謝的。
sentences: metabolic activity 代謝活動
metabolic force 代謝力

meaning: 為了維持生命而在生物體內發生的化學過程。
sentences: The metabolisms of aerobic bacteria require oxygen 好氧菌的新陳代謝需要氧氣
The term metabolism refers to the chemical processes that occur within a living organism in order to maintain life. 新陳代謝一詞是指生物體內為了維持生命而發生的化學過程。

meaning: 由代謝反應產生或參與代謝反應的任何物質。
sentences: The term metabolite refers to Any substance produced by, or taking part in, a metabolic reaction. 術語代謝物是指由代謝反應產生或參與代謝反應的任何物質。
We learned the meaning of metabolite during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了代謝物的意義。
The old gate was made of strong and heavy wrought iron metal. 那扇舊門是由結實笨重的鍛鐵金屬製成的。
Gold and silver are precious metals used in jewelry making. 金和銀是用於珠寶製作的貴金屬。

meaning: 金屬的、關於金屬的或金屬的特性。
sentences: Something described as metallic is of, relating to, or characteristic of metal. 被描述為金屬的東西是金屬的、與金屬有關的或具有金屬的特徵。
The word metallic is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 金屬這個字通常用來描述人、事物或情況。
The poet used a beautiful metaphor to describe the changing of the seasons. 詩人使用了一個美麗的隱喻來描寫季節的更替。
Life is often compared to a journey, which is a common and powerful metaphor. 生活常被比作一場旅行，這是一個常見且有力的隱喻。

meaning: 與隱喻有關或以隱喻為特徵的；比喻的；象徵性的。
sentences: The report describes the result as metaphorical. 該報告將這一結果描述為隱喻。
Everyone noticed the metaphorical tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的隱喻語氣。

meaning: 以比喻的方式；不是字面上的；透過比喻的方式。
sentences: He conveyed his teachings metaphorically. 他用比喻的方式傳達了他的教導。
The team responded metaphorically to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了隱喻性的回應。

meaning: 物理學元邏輯；物理學的邏輯架構。
sentences: Even other universes should be a result of different physics. Without rules, these universes wouldn't exist, because they will have an undefined, thus impossible, nature. We will never understand or guess all possible forms of physics. That's why we have to understand the generic metaphysics. 甚至其他宇宙也應該是不同物理的結果。沒有規則，這些宇宙就不會存在，因為它們將具有未定義的、因此不可能的性質。我們永遠無法理解或猜測物理學的所有可能形式。這就是為什麼我們必須了解一般形而上學。
The term metaphysics refers to The metalogic of physics; the logical framework of physics. 形上學一詞指的是物理學的元邏輯；物理學的邏輯架構。

meaning: 自然 、 形式 格式 質量 的 變化 。
sentences: The term metastasis refers to A change in nature, form, or quality. 轉移一詞是指 變化 自然 、 品質 。 術語「轉移」是指性質、形式或品質的變化。 轉移是指變化自然、品質。
The lesson introduced metastasis as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了轉移作為一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了轉移作為一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了轉移作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 類似於 Poi 球的道具，在繩索或電纜的末端旋轉。
sentences: The term meteor refers to a prop similar to poi balls, in that it is twirled at the end of a cord or cable. 流星這個術語指的是一種類似 poi 球的道具，因為它在繩索或電纜的末端旋轉。
The lesson introduced meteor as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了流星這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 流星體殘骸的金屬或石質物體或物體。
sentences: The term meteorite refers to a metallic or stony object or body that is the remains of a meteoroid. 隕石一詞是指流星體遺骸的金屬或石質物體或物體。
The lesson introduced meteorite as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了隕石作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The trip was postponed because the meteorological conditions were so bad. 由於氣象條件太差，行程延後。
The report describes the result as meteorological. 該報告將這一結果描述為氣象結果。

meaning: 研究大氣及其現象，尤其是天氣和天氣預報的科學。
sentences: study of meteorology 氣象學研究
department of meteorology 氣象系
There are one thousand meters in one single kilometer. 一公里等於一千公尺。
The taxi meter showed that the fare was fifteen dollars. 計程車計費器顯示車費是十五美元。

meaning: 最簡單的脂肪族碳氫化合物 CH₄，是天然氣的組成部分，也是最豐富的溫室氣體之一。
sentences: Cattle emit a large amount of methane. 牛排放大量甲烷。
The term methane refers to the simplest aliphatic hydrocarbon, CH₄, being a constituent of natural gas, and one of the most abundant greenhouse gases. 術語「甲烷」是指最簡單的脂肪族碳氫化合物CH4，它是天然氣的組成部分，也是最豐富的溫室氣體之一。
We need to find a more efficient method of solving the problem. 我們需要找到一個更有效率的解決問題的方法。
The scientific method is based on observation and evidence. 科學方法是基於觀察與證據的。

meaning: 依方法安排；以適當的方式佈置，或以說明主題的方式佈置，或以方便實際觀察的方式佈置。
sentences: the methodical arrangement of arguments; a methodical treatise 有條不紊地安排論點；有條理的論文

Something described as methodical is arranged with regard to method; disposed in a suitable manner, or in a manner to illustrate a subject, or to facilitate practical observation. 所謂有條理的東西，是針對方法而安排的；以適當的方式佈置，或者以說明主題的方式佈置，或者以方便實際觀察的方式佈置。
The term methodist refers to one who follows a method. 衛理公會一詞指的是遵循某種方法的人。
The lesson introduced methodist as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了衛理公會是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 研究某一領域所使用的方法。
sentences: research methodology 研究方法
The term methodology refers to the study of methods used in a field. 術語「方法論」是指對某個領域所使用的方法的研究。

meaning: 單價烴基 CH3-，形式上由甲烷失去一個氫原子衍生而來；連接這樣的基團所形成的化合物或化合物的一部分。
sentences: The term methyl refers to the univalent hydrocarbon radical, CH3-, formally derived from methane by the loss of a hydrogen atom; a compound or part of a compound formed by the attachment of such a radical. 術語甲基是指單價烴基CH3-，形式上由甲烷透過失去氫原子衍生而來；透過連接這樣的基團形成的化合物或化合物的一部分。
The lesson introduced methyl as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了甲基作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 測量或分析有關流程品質或有效性的統計數據。
sentences: We need to metric the status of software documentation. 我們需要衡量軟體文件的狀態。
We need to metric the verification of requirements. 我們需要衡量需求的驗證。
We took the metro to get to the city center. 我們搭地鐵去市中心。
The city's metro system is very clean and efficient. 該市的地鐵系統非常乾淨且高效。
The city's metropolitan area includes several smaller towns and suburbs. 該市的大都市區包括幾個小鎮和郊區。
The government is investing more money in improving the metropolitan transportation network. 政府正在投入更多資金來改善大城市的交通網絡。
I love Mexican food, especially tacos and burritos. 我喜歡墨西哥料理，尤其是塔可餅和捲餅。
She is studying Mexican history at university. 她正在大學學習墨西哥歷史。
To make interconnections easier, we added a mezzanine PCB. 為了使互連更容易，我們添加了夾層 PCB。
The report describes the result as mezzanine. 該報告將結果描述為夾層。

meaning: 分心或註意力不集中（可能指貓被老鼠分心）。
sentences: To mice means to be distracted or inattentive (possibly alluding to a cat being distracted by a mouse). 對老鼠來說意味著分心或註意力不集中（可能指貓被老鼠分心）。
People may mice in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下老鼠。

meaning: 天主教徒，尤其是愛爾蘭血統的天主教徒。
sentences: The term mick refers to a Catholic, particularly of Irish descent. 米克一詞指的是天主教徒，特別是愛爾蘭血統的天主教徒。
The lesson introduced mick as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 mick 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 小，相對較小；用來對比修飾名詞的程度。
sentences: At the micro level he was a good manager. At the macro level he failed. 從微觀層面來看，他是一位優秀的管理者。在宏觀層面上他失敗了。
Something described as micro is small, relatively small; used to contrast levels of the noun modified. 所謂“微”，是指較小的、相對較小的；用於對比所修飾名詞的程度。

meaning: 微生物或微生物的、關於微生物或微生物的、或由微生物或微生物引起的。
sentences: Something described as microbial is of, relating to, or caused by microbes or microorganisms. 被描述為微生物的東西是微生物或微生物的、與微生物或微生物相關的、或由微生物或微生物引起的。
The word microbial is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 微生物這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 生物學的一個分支，研究微生物，特別是微生物對人類和其他生物體的影響。
sentences: The term microbiology refers to the branch of biology that deals with microorganisms, especially their effects on man and other living organisms. 微生物學一詞是指研究微生物的生物學分支，特別是微生物對人類和其他生物的影響。
The lesson introduced microbiology as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了微生物學作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The singer stepped up to the microphone and began to sing. 歌手走向麥克風，開始唱歌。
Is the microphone turned on? 麥克風打開了嗎？
The guest speaker used a microphone to address the large crowd. 客座講師使用麥克風對大群眾講話。
Could you please speak into the mike? We can't hear you clearly. 能請妳對著麥克風說話嗎？我們聽不太清楚。
The biology students are using a microscope to study human cells. 生物系學生正使用顯微鏡觀察人體細胞。
The researchers are examining the mineral samples under a microscope. 研究人員正用顯微鏡檢查礦物樣本。

meaning: 屬於或與顯微鏡或顯微術有關的；顯微鏡下的。
sentences: We supply all microscopic stains and other materials. 我們提供所有微觀污漬和其他材料。
Something described as microscopic is of, or relating to microscopes or microscopy; microscopal. 被描述為微觀的東西屬於或與顯微鏡或顯微鏡有關；微觀的。

meaning: 顯微鏡的研究、設計與製造。
sentences: The term microscopy refers to the study of microscopes, their design and manufacture. 顯微鏡一詞是指對顯微鏡及其設計和製造的研究。
The lesson introduced microscopy as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了顯微鏡作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She heated up the leftover pasta in the microwave for lunch. 她用微波爐加熱了剩餘的義大利麵當午餐。
Modern microwaves are equipped with various convenient features. 現代微波爐配備了各種便利的功能。
The sun was high in the mid-afternoon sky. 午後的太陽高掛在天空中。
She moved to London in her mid-twenties. 她在二十五、六歲（二十多歲中間）時搬到了倫敦。
One indicates the time as one hour after twelve midday or midnight. 一表示時間為中午十二點或午夜後一小時。
The term midday refers to noon; twelve o'clock during the day. 「中午」一詞是指中午；白天十二點。
He was standing in the middle of the crowded room. 他正站在擁擠房間的正中央。
I usually wake up in the middle of the night to drink water. 我通常在半夜醒來喝水。

meaning: 中等或中等大小、位置或品質；平庸。
sentences: The football team is never the worst or best in its league; its position is always middling. 足球隊從來都不是聯盟中最差或最好的球隊；它的地位始終是中等的。
The report describes the result as middling. 報告稱結果為中等。

meaning: 小人使用的東西；尤其是為某人設計或製造的東西。
sentences: The term midget refers to something for use by a small person; especially something designed or made for one. 侏儒這個字指的是小個子使用的東西。尤其是為某人設計或製造的東西。
The lesson introduced midget as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了侏儒這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一個國家不靠近邊界的地區；內部。
sentences: The term midland refers to the region of a country not near the borders; the interior. 中部地區一詞指的是一個國家不靠近邊界的地區；內部。
The lesson introduced midland as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了米德蘭這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The movie starts at midnight and finishes at 2:00 a.m. 電影在午夜開始，凌晨兩點結束。
The old church clock struck midnight, echoing through the city. 舊教堂的鐘敲響了午夜，在城市中迴盪。
He found himself in the midst of a crowd of angry protesters in the city center. 他發現自己正處於市中心一群憤怒的抗議者當中。
The company is currently in the midst of a major restructuring process. 公司目前正處於重大重組過程之中（正在進行中）。

meaning: 夏至前後的時期；北半球6月21日左右。
sentences: The term midsummer refers to the period around the summer solstice; around June 21st in the northern hemisphere. 仲夏一詞是指夏至前後的時期。北半球6月21日左右。
The lesson introduced midsummer as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了仲夏這個術語，這是一個值得理解的有用術語。

meaning: 處於道路或距離的中間；中。
sentences: He told me to identify a good midway point at which I could pause the job. 他告訴我確定一個可以暫停工作的好中點。
A: Where's the ship at currently? B: It is midway. A: 船現在在哪裡？ B: 已經中途了。

meaning: 受過協助婦女分娩訓練但不是醫生的人，通常是婦女。
sentences: A hundred years ago, a midwife would bring the baby into the world - going to a hospital to deliver a baby was either impossible or unheard of. 一百年前，助產士將嬰兒帶到這個世界上——去醫院接生要么是不可能的，要么是聞所未聞的。
Modernly, a hospital midwife is usually a registered nurse. 現代，醫院助產士通常是註冊護士。
It might rain this afternoon, so you should take an umbrella. 今天下午可能會下雨，所以你應該帶把傘。
The army attacked with all its might. 軍隊竭盡全力發動了攻擊。
The mighty oak tree has stood in the forest for over a century. 強大的橡樹已在森林中屹立了一個多世紀。
Success requires a mighty effort and a very positive attitude. 成功需要巨大的努力與非常積極的態度。

meaning: 嚴重的致殘性頭痛，通常僅影響頭部的一側，並常伴隨噁心、嘔吐、畏光和視力障礙。
sentences: He had a headache so bad that he wished he was dead, but it was the sort of migraine that promised him he would continue to suffer but not die. 他頭痛得很厲害，希望自己死掉，但正是這種偏頭痛讓他承諾他會繼續受苦，但不會死。
After consuming too much coffee every day for six weeks, she got severe migraines that would last up until 47 minutes after her first cup of coffee. 連續六週每天喝太多咖啡後，她出現了嚴重的偏頭痛，這種偏頭痛會持續到她喝第一杯咖啡後的 47 分鐘。
The country has experienced a significant increase in the number of migrants. 該國經歷了移民（移居者）人數的顯著增加。
The project aims to provide support and resources to migrant workers. 該專案旨在為外籍勞工（移民工人）提供支持和資源。

meaning: 跨越邊境改變居住地；從一個國家或政治區域移居到另一個國家或政治區域。
sentences: To escape persecution, they migrated to a neutral country. 為了逃避迫害，他們移居到中立國家。
To migrate means to change habitations across a border; to move from one country or political region to another. 遷移意味著跨越邊界改變居住地；從一個國家或政治區域移居到另一個國家或政治區域。
The annual migration of birds to the south is a fascinating natural phenomenon. 鳥類每年向南遷徙是引人入勝的自然現象。
The country has experienced a significant increase in migration over the past decade. 該國在過去十年中經歷了移民（移居）的大幅增加。
migratory habits; a migratory life 遷徙習性；遷徙的生活
Something described as migratory is roving; wandering; nomadic. 被描述為遷徙的東西是漫遊；徘徊；游牧的。
The doctor said that her medical condition is serious but mild now. 醫生說她的病況嚴重但現在還算輕微（輕微）。
Taiwan has a mild climate with warm winters and humid summers today. 台灣現今氣候溫和（輕微），冬季溫暖，夏季潮濕。
a mildly amusing joke 一個有點好笑的笑話
If someone acts mildly, they do so in a way that is to a mild degree; slightly. 如果某人的行為溫和，那麼他們的行為方式就會達到溫和的程度；輕微地。
It takes about fifteen minutes to walk a mile. 走一英里大約需要十五分鐘。
The hotel is located several miles away from the city center. 飯店位於離市中心好幾英里遠的地方。

meaning: 某事物已經產生或將來可能產生的服務量。
sentences: This old PC has still got plenty of mileage in it. 這台舊電腦仍然有足夠的使用壽命。
There’s quite a lot of mileage in language, speech and computing, particularly in research. 在語言、語音和計算方面，尤其是在研究方面，有相當多的進展。
The successful completion of the project is a major milestone for the company. 專案的圓滿完成是公司的一個重大里程碑。
Graduating from university is a significant milestone in any young person's life. 大學畢業是任何年輕人生命中的一個重大事件（里程碑）。

meaning: 環境 或 設定; 環境
sentences: The term milieu refers to An environment or setting; a medium; environs. 環境一詞指的是 環境 或 設定 ； rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/environs" title="environs">環境 。 「環境」一詞是指環境或環境；一種媒介；環境。 完成環境指的是 環境 或設定 ； rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/environs" title="environs">環境 。
The lesson introduced milieu as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「環境」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了「環境」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了“環境”這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 積極支持某個想法、團體、政治或社會事業等；頑固的、好鬥的。
sentences: Something described as militant is aggressively supporting of an idea, group, political or social cause, etc.; adamant, combative. 激進的事物是指積極支持某個想法、團體、政治或社會事業等；堅定、好鬥。
The word militant is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 激進這個詞經常被用來描述一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 透過軍事或其他交戰手段。
sentences: The borders of the empire were expanded militarily over the course of many wars of conquest. 在多次征服戰爭的過程中，帝國的疆域在軍事上不斷擴張。
The team responded militarily to the change. 該團隊對這一變化做出了軍事反應。
He decided to join the military after graduating from high school. 他中學畢業後決定參軍。
The country's military power has increased significantly lately. 該國的軍事力量最近有了顯著提升。
Drinking a glass of warm milk before bed can help you sleep better. 睡前喝一杯熱牛奶可以幫助你睡得更好。
We need to buy some fresh milk and eggs at the store. 我們需要在商店買一些鮮奶和雞蛋。

meaning: 給任何動物擠奶的行為。
sentences: We try to finish milking early in the morning so we can turn the cows out to pasture during the day. 我們盡量在清晨 擠奶 ，這樣我們就可以在白天將乳牛趕出牧場。 我們盡量在清晨完成擠奶，這樣我們就可以在白天將乳牛放牧。 我們在早上擠奶，這樣我們就可以在白天將乳牛趕出牧場。
The snake milker massages the glands to extract the full measure of venom during each milking. 每次 擠奶 期間，蛇 擠奶工 會按摩腺體以提取全部 毒液 每次擠奶時，蛇擠乳工人都會按摩腺體，以提取全部毒液。 頂部擠奶期間，蛇腺擠乳工會取出全部毒液
milky tea; milky cocoa 奶茶；乳白色可可
Something described as milky is containing (an especially large amount of) milk. 被描述為乳狀的東西含有（特別大量）牛奶。
The machine manages to grind the hard grain seeds in the large mill. 這台機器竟然（能）在大型磨坊（磨）中研磨堅硬的穀物種子。
The city center was once a major hub for the local textile mill. 市中心曾是當地紡織廠（磨）的主要樞紐。
Coarsely milled maize is termed cornmeal, but when finely milled and sifted it is called corn flour. 粗磨的玉米被稱為玉米粉，但細磨和過篩後的玉米被稱為玉米粉。
The report describes the result as milled. 該報告將結果描述為“銑削”。
The term millennia refers to a single period of 1000 years, a millennium. 千年一詞指的是一千年的單一時期，即千年。
The lesson introduced millennia as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了千年作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 指某事件或事件發生一千週年。
sentences: a millennial fair 千禧年博覽會
Something described as millennial is referring to the thousandth anniversary of an event or happening. 所謂千禧年是指某一事件或事件發生一千週年。

meaning: 一千年的一個時期結束而另一個時期開始的年份，尤其是 2000 年。
sentences: A huge fireworks display was put on in Sydney to celebrate the millennium. 雪梨舉行了一場盛大的煙火表演來慶祝千禧年。
The term millennium refers to the year in which one period of one thousand years ends and another begins, especially the year 2000. 千禧年一詞是指一千年的一個時期結束而另一個時期開始的那一年，特別是2000年。
Over ten million people live in this bustling city. 超過一千萬人生活在這座繁華的城市裡。
He won a million dollars in the lottery last year. 他去年中了百萬美元的樂透。
He became a world-famous millionaire after selling his tech company. 他在賣掉公司後成了一名舉世聞名的百萬富翁。
Traveling around the entire world is a dream of every millionaire now. 環遊世界是現今每位百萬富翁的夢報。

meaning: 透過手勢來表示動作或物體，而不使用聲音。
sentences: In this game, you're given a word, which you have to mime to the others in the group. 在這個遊戲中，你會得到一個單詞，你必須向小組中的其他人模仿這個單字。
People often mime when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會模仿。
The young boy managed to mimic his father's voice perfectly on the phone. 小男孩成功地在電話裡完美地模仿了父親的聲音。
Some species of animals mimic their surroundings to protect themselves. 某些動物物種會模擬（模仿）其周圍環境以保護自己。
The mimosa plant closes its leaves when touched. 含羞草被觸碰時會閉合葉子。
The room was decorated with beautiful yellow mimosa flowers. 房間裡裝飾著漂亮的黃色含羞草花。
Mince tastes really good fried in a pan with some chopped onion and tomato. 肉末與切碎的洋蔥和番茄一起在鍋中煎炸，味道非常好。
The term mince refers to finely chopped meat; minced meat. 術語“肉末”是指切碎的肉。碎肉。
I don't mind walking if it's not too far. 如果不太遠的話，我不介意走路。
He has a brilliant mind and is always coming up with new ideas. 他擁有聰穎的頭腦，總是能想出新主意。

meaning: 屬於或關於正念的；維持當下對自己頭腦內容的後設注意力。
sentences: I think being mindful may help you to appreciate life more. 我認為正念可以幫助你更珍惜生活。
Something described as mindful is of or pertaining to mindfulness; sustaining meta-attention of the contents of one's own mind in the present moment. 被描述為正念的東西是正念的或與正念有關的；維持當下對自己頭腦內容的後設注意力。
This book is mine; I bought it yesterday. 這本書是我的，我昨天買的。
They are working in a deep gold mine in the mountains. 他們正在山裡的一個深金礦中工作。
He decided to become a professional coal miner after high school. 他中學畢業後決定成為一名專業的煤礦工。
The miners managing to work deep beneath the mountain ground today. 礦工今天竟然（能）在大山地底深處工作。
Water is a clear and odorless liquid that is rich in minerals today. 水是一種現今富含礦物質（礦物）的清澈無味液體。
The researchers identified several rare minerals in the soil samples. 研究人員在土壤樣本中鑑定出了幾種稀有礦物。
We decided to arrive early at the party to mingle with the other guests. 我們決定早點到派對，以便與其他客人交際（往來）。
The sweet scent of fresh jasmine mingled with the cool morning air. 新鮮茉莉花的甜美香味與清晨涼爽的空氣混合在一起。
He collects miniature models of classic cars and has a very impressive collection. 他收集經典汽車的微型模型，且藏品非常豐富。
The dollhouse was filled with beautiful miniature furniture and ornaments. 娃娃屋裡裝滿了精美的小型（微型）家具和裝飾品。
The company's marketing efforts had a minimal impact on sales last year. 公司的行銷努力對去年的銷售額影響極小。
The project was completed with minimal disruption to the local community. 該專案在對當地社區造成極少擾動的情況下完成了。

meaning: 以最小的方式；在最小程度上。
sentences: minimally invasive surgery 微創手術
If someone acts minimally, they do so in a way that is in a minimal way; to the least extent. 如果某人的行為最少，那麼他們會以最少的方式這樣做；在最小程度上。
The new policy aims to minimize environmental damage from industrial activities. 新政策旨在將工業活動對環境的破壞降到最低限度。
It is important to minimize the risk of accidents by following the safety rules. 遵循安全規則以將事故風險最小化非常重要。
The company is campaigning for a higher minimum hourly wage today. 公司今天正爭取提高最低（最低限度）時薪。
Please ensure that you have a minimum understanding of rules now. 妳現在應該確保自己對規則有最基本的（最低限度）了解。

meaning: 任何榨取或破壞的活動。
sentences: His extensive mining for apparently statistically significant results made any of his results questionable. 他對明顯具有統計意義的結果進行了廣泛的挖掘，這使得他的任何結果都值得懷疑。
The term mining refers to Any activity that extracts or undermines. 採礦一詞是指任何開採或破壞的活動。

meaning: 另一個人的忠實僕人，通常是一個更強大的人。
sentences: The archvillain deployed his minions to simultaneously rob every bank in the city. 大惡棍部署了他的爪牙同時搶劫城市中的每家銀行。
The term minion refers to a loyal servant of another, usually a more powerful being. 奴才一詞指的是另一個人（通常是更強大的存在）的忠實僕人。
The prime minister addressed the entire nation on television tonight. 首相（部長）今晚在電視上向全國發表了演講。
He decided to become a religious minister and serve his community. 他決定成為一名宗教牧師（部長）並服務他的社群。

meaning: 充當文書或手段（即程序性或輔助性，而非實質）。
sentences: Filling out the form under the direction of a lawyer is a ministerial task performed by a legal secretary. 在律師的指導下填寫表格是法律秘書執行的一項部長級任務。
Something described as ministerial is serving as an instrument or means (i.e., procedural or ancillary, not substantive). 所謂部長級的東西是作為一種工具或手段（即程序性或輔助性的，而不是實質的）。
The ministry of education is taking steps to improve public school. 教育部（部）正採取措施改善公立學校。
She works as a senior consultant for the national finance ministry. 她在國家財政部（部）擔任高級顧問。

meaning: 個人衛生不良的人；一個有臭味的人。
sentences: The term mink refers to a person with poor personal hygiene; a smelly person. 水貂一詞指的是個人衛生狀況不佳的人；一個有臭味的人。
The lesson introduced mink as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了水貂作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The term minnie refers to a minenwerfer trench mortar. 「米妮」一詞指的是「minenwerfer」戰壕迫擊砲。
The lesson introduced minnie as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了米妮這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。
The car accident resulted in only minor damage to the bumper. 這次車禍僅導致保險桿輕微受損。
It was a minor problem that was easily resolved. 那是一個很容易解決的小問題。
The ethnic minority groups have a rich cultural heritage. 少數民族群體擁有豐富的文化遺產。
A small minority of people disagreed with the new policy. 一小部分人不同意這項新政策。
She added a few fresh mint leaves to her lemonade for a refreshing flavor. 她在檸檬水中加了幾片新鮮的薄荷葉以增加清爽口感。
He bought a vintage car that was in mint condition and looked brand new. 他買了一輛保存得如新（嶄新的）一樣的古董車。
The temperature dropped to minus ten degrees Celsius last night. 昨晚氣溫降到了攝氏零下十度。
Five minus two equals three, which is a basic mathematical fact. 五減二等於三，這是一個基本的數學事實。
Please wait for a minute; I'll be right back. 請等一分鐘，我馬上回來。
There are sixty minutes in an hour. 一小時有六十分鐘。
It was a complete miracle that everyone survived the accident. 每個人都在那次事故中生還簡直是一個奇蹟。
The discovery of fire was a major miracle for early humans. 火的發現對於早期人類來說是一個重大的奇蹟。
The patient made a miraculous recovery after several months of treatment. 病人在幾個月的治療後奇蹟般地康復了。
To our astonishment, the small team managed a miraculous victory in the final. 令我們驚訝的是，這支小團隊在決賽中取得了一場不可思議（奇蹟般）的勝利。

meaning: 使看起來像或像海市蜃樓。
sentences: To mirage means to cause to appear as or like a mirage. 海市蜃樓的意思是使看起來像海市蜃樓或像海市蜃樓一樣。
People may mirage in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下出現海市蜃樓。
She looked at herself in the mirror and adjusted her hair. 她照了照鏡子，整理了一下頭髮。
The calm water of the lake acted as a perfect mirror for the sky. 湖面平靜的水成了天空完美的鏡像。
She suffered a tragic miscarriage in her second trimester. 她在懷孕中期不幸流產了。
The trial was seen as a major miscarriage of justice. 這場審判被視為重大的審判不公。
The drawer was filled with miscellaneous items, such as keys and old photos. 抽屜裡裝滿了雜物（各式各樣的東西），如鑰匙和舊照片。
The report provides a list of miscellaneous expenses incurred during the trip. 報告提供了旅行期間產生的各項雜費（混雜的支出）清單。
The naughty little boy was always getting into some kind of mischief. 那個調皮的小男孩總是陷入某種惡作劇中。
She had a look of innocent mischief on her face after the joke now. 開完玩笑後，她現在臉上帶著一種天真（純真）的惡作劇神情。
The mischievous little boy hid his sister's favorite doll in the backyard. 那個淘氣的小男孩把姐姐心愛的娃娃藏在了後院。
She had a mischievous smile on her face as she planned the surprise. 她臉上帶著調皮的（淘氣的）微笑，計畫著那個驚喜。

meaning: 一個錯誤的信念，一個錯誤的想法。
sentences: There are several common misconceptions about the theory of relativity. 關於相對論有幾個常見的誤解。
You're obviously under the misconception that I care about your problems. 你顯然誤以為我關心你的問題。

meaning: 被認為是不可接受的行為。
sentences: The student was banned from using the university's computing resources for two weeks due to gross misconduct on the Internet. 由於網路上存在嚴重不當行為，該學生被禁止使用大學的計算資源兩週。
The term misconduct refers to behavior that is considered to be unacceptable. 不當行為一詞是指被認為是不可接受的行為。

meaning: 大多數普通法法律體系中較輕的犯罪行為，通常比重罪受到的懲罰要輕。

meaning: 管理不當、不稱職或不誠實的過程或做法。

meaning: 對女性的仇恨、蔑視或偏見。

meaning: 年輕女性或小姐；作為溫和貶低的術語，通常用於開玩笑或斥責。
sentences: That's enough out of you, missy! 你夠了，小姐！
The term missy refers to a young female, or miss; as a term of mild disparagement, typically used jokingly or rebukingly. 「小姐」一詞指的是年輕女性或小姐；作為溫和貶義的術語，通常用於開玩笑或斥責。

meaning: 製造或噴射霧氣的裝置。
sentences: Odessa D. uses a mister Sunday to fight the 106-degree heat at a NASCAR race in Fontana, California. Odessa D. 在加州豐塔納舉行的 NASCAR 比賽中使用 Sunday 先生來對抗 106 度的高溫。

meaning: 儘管有必要，但沒有得到同情和理解的看待。
sentences: a misunderstood loner who turned to a life of crime 一個被誤解的孤獨者轉向犯罪生活

meaning: 強姦（婦女）；後來更廣泛地說，對（某人）進行性虐待。

meaning: 突然改變的傾向；易變性，可變性。

a national mobilization to fight climate change 全國動員應對氣候變遷

meaning: 像母親一樣對待某人；為某人做母親。

meaning: 主權體現在單一國家元首的政府中，今天通常是世襲的國家元首（無論是作為傀儡還是作為強大的統治者）。

meaning: 僧侶或其他發過宗教誓言的人的住所。

meaning: 使一項活動能夠產生利潤，特別是在電腦和網路相關的活動中。
sentences: We considered monetizing our computer help forums by inserting ad banners. The word monetize is central here. 我們考慮透過插入廣告橫幅來透過我們的電腦幫助論壇獲利。貨幣化這個詞是這裡的核心。

I need to save some money for my upcoming summer vacation. 我需要為即將到來的暑假存點錢。

meaning: 交易 或 兜售 （通常是指定商品）。
sentences: fish mongering 魚 販賣 魚販
The term mongering refers to Trading or peddling (typically, of a specified commodity). 術語「販賣」是指 交易 或 兜售 （通常指特定商品）。 術語「販賣」是指交易或兜售（通常是特定商品）。 術語“大象”是指交易或兜售（通常指特定商品）。

meaning: 個人姓名或暱稱；非正式標籤，通常會引起人們對特定屬性的注意。
sentences: The rookie was upset at being called Lemon Drop until she realized that everyone on the team had a silly moniker. 這位新秀因為被稱為檸檬滴而感到不安，直到她意識到團隊中的每個人都有一個愚蠢的綽號。

meaning: 單聲道或單聲道；只有一個音訊通道。
sentences: Because many in the audience were very close to one of the speakers, the DJ decided to play the music in mono. 由於許多觀眾離其中一位演講者非常近，因此 DJ 決定以單聲道播放音樂。

sentences: The term monochrome refers to A ceramic glaze of a single colour; an object so glazed. 術語「單色」是指單一顏色的 陶瓷 釉料 ；一個如此光滑的物體。 單色一詞是指單一顏色的陶瓷釉料；一個如此光滑的物體。 術語「胭脂」是指單一顏色的陶瓷釉料；一個如此光滑的物體。

The lesson introduced monograph as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了專著作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

sentences: Mainstream culture is hardly the monolithic block that its caricaturization often implies. 主流文化並不像它的漫畫所暗示的那樣是一個整體。

meaning: 戲劇中一個人的長篇演講；有時是獨白；其他時候與其他角色交談。
sentences: The term monologue refers to a long speech by one person in a play; sometimes a soliloquy; other times spoken to other characters. 獨白一詞是指戲劇中一個人的長篇演講；有時是獨白；其他時候與其他角色交談。

meaning: 一個男人，尤其是一個法國紳士。

meaning: 鰻魚科的大型世界性肉食性鰻魚。
